CVE-2020-15690.title: In Nim before 1.2.6, the standard library asyncftpclient lacks a  ...
CVE-2020-15690.description: In Nim before 1.2.6, the standard library asyncftpclient lacks a check for whether a message contains a newline character.

CVE-2020-15692.title: In Nim 1.2.4, the standard library browsers mishandles the URL ar ...
CVE-2020-15692.description: In Nim 1.2.4, the standard library browsers mishandles the URL argument to browsers.openDefaultBrowser. This argument can be a local file path that will be opened in the default explorer. An attacker can pass one argument to the underlying open command to execute arbitrary registered system commands.

CVE-2020-15693.title: In Nim 1.2.4, the standard library httpClient is vulnerable to a  ...
CVE-2020-15693.description: In Nim 1.2.4, the standard library httpClient is vulnerable to a CR-LF injection in the target URL. An injection is possible if the attacker controls any part of the URL provided in a call (such as httpClient.get or httpClient.post), the User-Agent header value, or custom HTTP header names or values.

CVE-2020-15694.title: In Nim 1.2.4, the standard library httpClient fails to properly v ...
CVE-2020-15694.description: In Nim 1.2.4, the standard library httpClient fails to properly validate the server response. For example, httpClient.get().contentLength() does not raise any error if a malicious server provides a negative Content-Length.

CVE-2020-23171.title: A vulnerability in all versions of Nim-lang allows unauthenticate ...
CVE-2020-23171.description: A vulnerability in all versions of Nim-lang allows unauthenticated attackers to write files to arbitrary directories via a crafted zip file with dot-slash characters included in the name of the crafted file.

CVE-2021-21372.title: Nimble is a package manager for the Nim programming language. In  ...
CVE-2021-21372.description: Nimble is a package manager for the Nim programming language. In Nim release version before versions 1.2.10 and 1.4.4, Nimble doCmd is used in different places and can be leveraged to execute arbitrary commands. An attacker can craft a malicious entry in the packages.json package list to trigger code execution.

CVE-2021-21373.title: Nimble is a package manager for the Nim programming language. In  ...
CVE-2021-21373.description: Nimble is a package manager for the Nim programming language. In Nim release versions before versions 1.2.10 and 1.4.4, "nimble refresh" fetches a list of Nimble packages over HTTPS by default. In case of error it falls back to a non-TLS URL http://irclogs.nim-lang.org/packages.json. An attacker able to perform MitM can deliver a modified package list containing malicious software packages. If the packages are installed and used the attack escalates to untrusted code execution.

CVE-2021-21374.title: Nimble is a package manager for the Nim programming language. In  ...
CVE-2021-21374.description: Nimble is a package manager for the Nim programming language. In Nim release versions before versions 1.2.10 and 1.4.4, "nimble refresh" fetches a list of Nimble packages over HTTPS without full verification of the SSL/TLS certificate due to the default setting of httpClient. An attacker able to perform MitM can deliver a modified package list containing malicious software packages. If the packages are installed and used the attack escalates to untrusted code execution.

CVE-2021-29495.title: Nim is a statically typed compiled systems programming language.  ...
CVE-2021-29495.description: Nim is a statically typed compiled systems programming language. In Nim standard library before 1.4.2, httpClient SSL/TLS certificate verification was disabled by default. Users can upgrade to version 1.4.2 to receive a patch or, as a workaround, set "verifyMode = CVerifyPeer" as documented.

CVE-2021-41259.title: Rejected reason: DO NOT USE THIS CANDIDATE NUMBER. ConsultIDs: No ...
CVE-2021-41259.description: Rejected reason: DO NOT USE THIS CANDIDATE NUMBER. ConsultIDs: None. Reason: This CVE ID has been rejected or withdrawn by its CVE Numbering Authority. Notes: None.

CVE-2021-46872.title: An issue was discovered in Nim before 1.6.2. The RST module of th ...
CVE-2021-46872.description: An issue was discovered in Nim before 1.6.2. The RST module of the Nim language stdlib, as used in NimForum and other products, permits the javascript: URI scheme and thus can lead to XSS in some applications. (Nim versions 1.6.2 and later are fixed; there may be backports of the fix to some earlier versions. NimForum 2.2.0 is fixed.)
